---
title: "Integration with google cloud lakehouse runtime catalog with snowflake"
description: "Google cloud lakehouse runtime catalogとsnowflakeの統合について"
date: "2026/07/08"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
  pdf:
    geometry: 
        - top=30mm
        - left=30mm
categories: [gcp, bigquery, snowflaka]
---

# Introduction
test
